assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all four notification types with dedicated sections for each: auto-upgrade scheduled (🟡 Important), new version available (🟢 Informational), end-of-life/deprecation (🔴 Critical), and security patch (🔴 Critical)

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response uses a clear urgency matrix with security patches in 🔴 Critical (24-48 hours), auto-upgrades in 🟡 Important (1-2 weeks), and new version available in 🟢 Informational (monthly review), correctly ordering from highest to lowest urgency

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly categorizes EoS warnings as 🔴 Critical requiring immediate action and provides specific guidance to plan upgrade timeline, with concrete commands and options for manual upgrades or Extended channel migration

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response provides a decision matrix and specific action items for auto-upgrade scheduled notifications, including evaluation of timing, testing considerations, and control options with specific gcloud commands for deferral or manual triggering

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states security patches are 🔴 Critical requiring action within 24-48 hours and provides emergency deferral commands for up to 30 days, acknowledging they may need to occur outside normal maintenance schedules

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response correctly categorizes new version available as 🟢 Informational with monthly review timeline and explicitly states to 'plan non-urgent upgrade' and 'review for new features' rather than immediate action

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response includes a dedicated section on structured notifications with specific gcloud commands to set up Pub/Sub topics and Cloud Logging sinks for programmatic GKE notification handling

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response includes a comment to 'Review release notes for new features between versions' when discussing new version available notifications, identifying release notes as the source for understanding version changes
